hero.introText: I'm Alejandro Romero Stankevich, a junior web developer based in Catalonia, Spain. I'm studying a Higher Degree in Web Development and building personal web projects with modern technologies.

exp.description_chatter: Full-stack social platform developed in 14 days. Click to view the LinkedIn post with test users and demo.
exp.description_wannapop: Wallapop clone developed with Flask. Click to view the LinkedIn post with instructions and test users.
exp.description: A mobile app designed as an interactive guide for a unique museum and its memory plaques. It addresses the lack of internet access at the site by providing offline access to all content. Features include QR scanning, multi-language support, and a responsive UI. Tech stack: Vue 3, Capacitor, TailwindCSS. Click to view more on LinkedIn.
exp.description1: Currently studying Web Application Development. Intensive training in full-stack development, agile methodologies, and application deployment.
exp.description2: On GitHub you can see all my updates and almost my entire learning journey, including my contributions and how my skills have evolved over time.

aboutMe.intro: At 15 I studied Bakery in Belarus, but at 17 I moved to Spain ready to build a future. My brother introduced me to programming and I knew it was for me. At 19 I passed the access exam for Higher Education and after trying bootcamps, I bet on formal education.
aboutMe.extra: At 21 I enrolled in Web App Development (DAW) and today, at 22, I am finishing it and looking for my first opportunity in IT. I speak Russian (Native), Spanish (Native), and English (B2). Open to junior roles! 🚀

contact.intro: Beyond code, I am driven by curiosity and the desire to create products that make a difference. I am actively looking to join a team where I can contribute, learn, and grow. Have a challenge for me? Let's talk!
